docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,046.78 FILED BY MAZER, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT MINT STAGING, LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-13-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MINT STAGING, LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT MINT STAGING, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-22-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-22-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF ROBERT MAZER APPEARED. DEFENDANT MINT STAGING LLC. APPEARED, REPRESENTED BY ALYSSA BRANDFASS AND TIM HEROD. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE MURLENE J. RANDLE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAZER, ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MINT STAGING, LLC DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF NOTHING. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
